calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order 1) Approving And Settling Receiver'S Final Report And Accounting
Off Calendar Nov-28-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ALEXANDER T. JONES OF JONES & DEVOY LLP, TEL. NO. 1-415-615-0879 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
KEVING SINGER, TEL. NO. 1-415-848-2984 RECEIVER ALSO PRESENT IN COURT.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling.Receiver Kevin Singer's motion for an order (1) approving and settling receiver's final report and accounting; (2) approving final compensation and reimbursement of expenses; (3) exonerating all bonds; and (4) retaining jurisdiction regarding this receivership is GRANTED. The requested relief appears appropriate. Petitioner filed a notice of non-opposition. No opposition was filed by any other party. Order signed in open court. Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 =302/jq

APPEARANCES - ATTY. ALEXANDER T. JONES OF JONES & DEVOY LLP, TEL. NO. 1-415-615-0879 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Petitioner Michael Kelly's motion for attorney fees and costs of $7884.37 is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported.=302/hk

Notice Of Hearing Petitioners Motion For Attorney Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Jul-01-2016 Continued To Sep-02-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

Confirmation And Over-Bid Hearing For The Sale Of Real Property
Off Calendar Jun-10-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Superior Court Receiver Kevin Singer telephone number 415-848-2984 in Propria Persona.
Both Brokers as well as the Sister of the buyer also present.

Mr. Singer stated that Judge Kahn's order was served on all parties in the case, that there is no opposition and that the matter was published three times in a county wide paper. In addition, Mr. Singer stated that notice was posted on the property, that language was changed in the multiple listing to indicate today's hearing, that notice was posted at City Hall and that no other bids were obtained on the property. Confirmation is granted and Sale Of Real Property located at 442 23rd Avenue in San Francisco is confirmed. Order signed in open Court.

Judge: Suzanne Bolanos. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/SB)
